deadNoElement.selector: html[data-contrast="hc"] body .chat-input-row .chat-side-control-btn svg :is(path, circle, line, rect, ellipse, polyline, polygon)
html[data-contrast="hc"] body .chat-tools-menu .chat-tools-item svg :is(path, circle, line, rect, ellipse, polyline, polygon)
html[data-contrast="hc"] body .chat-analysis-overlay .chat-analysis-overlay-card :is(p, span, div, strong, em)
html[data-contrast="hc"] body .chat-msg-ai .chat-assistant-action-btn svg :is(path, circle, line, rect, ellipse, polyline, polygon)

:root.theme-mono:not([data-contrast="hc"]) :is(.chat-rail-icon-btn, .chat-side-control-btn, .chat-tools-btn, .chat-document-attach-btn, .chat-listen-btn, .chat-send-btn, .chat-assistant-action-btn, .chat-dictate-btn) :is(svg, path, circle, rect, line, polyline, polygon)
:root.theme-mono:not([data-contrast="hc"]) .chat-tools-menu .chat-tools-item :is(svg, path, circle, rect, line, polyline, polygon)
:root.theme-mono:not([data-contrast="hc"]) .profile-email-dock-wrapper.profile-orbit-menu-wrapper .profile-orbit-item-icon :is(svg, path, circle, rect, line, polyline, polygon)

:root.theme-mono:not([data-contrast="hc"]) .profile-email-dock-wrapper.profile-orbit-menu-wrapper .profile-orbit-mobile-action.dock-item .dock-icon :is(svg, path, circle, rect, line, polyline, polygon)

html[data-contrast="hc"]
  :is(.policy-section-body, .policy-page-scroll, .guide-policy-scroll)
  :is(p, li, ul, ol, div, span, strong, em, b, i, small)

html[data-contrast="hc"] .subscription-content :is(
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    p,
    span,
    label,
    legend,
    li,
    a,
    button,
    strong,
    em
  )

html[data-contrast="hc"] .materials-page-shell :is(
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    p,
    span,
    label,
    legend,
    li,
    a,
    button:not(.back-button),
    strong,
    em
  )

html[data-contrast="hc"] .rooms-scroll :is(
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    p,
    span,
    label,
    legend,
    li,
    a,
    button,
    strong,
    em
  )

html[data-contrast="hc"] :is(
    .register-content,
    .invite-modal-content,
    .person-invite-modal-content,
    .update-pin-content,
    .update-email-content,
    .reset-password-content
  )
  :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, p, span, label, legend, li, a, button, strong, em)
html[data-contrast="hc"] #login-modal :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, p, span, label, legend, li, a, button, strong, em)
html[data-contrast="hc"] #login-modal.login-modal--otp .login-otp-content :is(p, span, label, strong, em, a, button)
html[data-contrast="hc"] #login-modal .login-email-icon :is(path, circle, line, rect, ellipse, polyline, polygon)
html[data-contrast="hc"] #login-modal .login-submit-icon :is(path, circle, line, rect, ellipse, polyline, polygon)

html[data-contrast="hc"] .a11y-modal-shell :is(.a11y-csp-scroll, .csp-overlayTitle)
  :is(h1, h2, h3, h4, p, span, label, legend, li, a, button, strong, em)
